mapper.insert: insert into shop(name, address, phone, cover_url, description, min_price, delivery_fee, rating, status, category_id, owner_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{coverUrl}, #{description}, #{minPrice}, #{deliveryFee}, #{rating}, #{status}, #{categoryId}, #{ownerId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update shop
name = #{name},
address = #{address},
phone = #{phone},
cover_url = #{coverUrl},
description = #{description},
min_price = #{minPrice},
delivery_fee = #{deliveryFee},
rating = #{rating},
status = #{status},
category_id = #{categoryId},
owner_id = #{ownerId},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
